chunks.title: The King's Dream and Decree
chunks.reason: Narrative of Nebuchadnezzar's troubled dream and the decree to kill the wise men.

chunks.title: Daniel Intervenes
chunks.reason: Daniel's negotiation with Arioch and his prayer for the mystery.

chunks.title: Daniel Before the King
chunks.reason: The king questions Daniel and Daniel attributes the revelation to God.

chunks.title: Interpretation of the Image
chunks.reason: Daniel describes the dream image and interprets the succession of kingdoms.

chunks.title: The King's Response
chunks.reason: Nebuchadnezzar honors Daniel and appoints him over the province.
